title: Craccina sulcata
taxonomy: Craccina sulcata is a species of plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This classification places it within the order Cucurbitales. As a member of the Cucurbitaceae family, Craccina sulcata is related to other plants such as cucumbers and melons. Craccina sulcata is native to tropical Africa and is often found growing in rocky outcrops and dry areas. The exact classification of Craccina sulcata may vary depending on the source and most recent botanical research.
